Pet Projects: How to stay motivated doing it?

October 1, 2017
discuss pet project productivity

Spring cleaned July 2026. Dusted off, broken images flagged, outdated notes added. Hi everyone! Got new project ideas? Have you finished your previous one? I doubt it!

So I have a question for "The Chosen Few" who actually finished their pet projects (especially if those aren't your day job) — how did you do it? Any advice?

Also, I'm encouraging everyone with a work-in-progress pet project to share theirs in the comments. Maybe knowing someone might check our project is the push we need to finish it.

I'm fairly new to JS, but mine was here: shop.zorexsalvo.xyz (now offline — it was a Vue e-commerce app)
Source: vuecommerce on GitHub
